alt_text: Mind-map of al-'Aql (Intellect): central green circle with the Arabic word 'العقل', connected by lines to five ellipses labeled — Container for knowledge, Freedom of Choice, Purpose of Obedience, Scale (2 Goods vs 2 Evils), Boundary.
